mission.objective: Diagnose why the v2 mockup feels lame versus the live homepage and propose amplitude lifts that turn it into an experience.
mission.founder_feedback: the hero image quality is still terrible. the collection cards so be 4 evenly aligned sections. the hero shouldnt be the same image as the collection, why is the jersey patched displayed. each collection card should be a image of the scene i want. why did you look at me regular page is you didnt add any of the excitement. your lame as fuck at making extrodinary websites i see
mission.success_metric: Mockup feels 'extraordinary' on first scroll — distinct hero, evenly aligned scene cards, motion moments, no duplicate imagery.

scope._scope_policy: FULL-SITE coverage. Agent sees and addresses every surface. Even when a fix sprint targets one page (e.g., home), the agent must verify ripple effects across header/footer/widgets/other-pages and call them out.
scope.scope_note: primary_focus_surfaces lists what the current fix sprint targets. The agent reports on ripple effects across all other surfaces in a brief 'Cross-surface implications' section.

performance_baseline.font_loading: self-hosted woff2, font-display: swap, preload Cinzel + Archivo

deliverables.name: Amplitude audit
sections: A — What live page has that mockup doesn't (5-8 elements w/ file:line refs)
B — The Five amplitude patterns (Kith / Oaklandish / Culture Kings / FOG / Palm Angels)
C — Image quality root-cause diagnosis (filter vs asset vs layout vs duplication)
D — Top 8 amplitude additions ranked by impact (name / source / difficulty / tier T1-T3)

roi_upgrade.mandate: Propose exactly 1 high-ROI motion/interaction upgrade per the Upgrade Mandate.
category_options: Scroll-driven scene takeover with cinematic crossfade between sections
Hero video-loop spec (silent muted autoplay, 1MB max, fallback to still)
View-transitions API choreography between cover → hero → spread
Parallax depth system (3 layers: bg / mid / fg) with rAF batching
Scroll-snap section with magnetic settle + scroll-driven CSS animations
Section-edge marquee strip with infinite scroll (CSS-only, no JS)
Cinematic letterbox-reveal on hero entrance (clip-path animation)

memory.write_mandate: Write at least 1 memory entry per dispatch when you discover a non-obvious motion/IA pattern, the founder corrects a recommendation, OR a polish layer from live page proves portable to mockup. Append slug to INDEX.md as `- [Title](slug.md) — one-line hook`.
